mapper.select: SELECT br.id, br.user_id, u.username, u.real_name, br.book_id, b.title AS book_title, b.isbn AS book_isbn, br.borrow_date, br.due_date, br.return_date, br.status, br.remark, br.create_time, br.update_time FROM borrow_record br LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON br.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN book_info b ON br.book_id = b.id WHERE br.id = #{id} AND br.deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 0 AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_record WHERE status = 0 AND due_date < #{today} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 0 AND due_date < #{today} AND deleted = 0

SELECT CONCAT( CAST(YEAR(borrow_date) AS VARCHAR), '-', CASE WHEN MONTH(borrow_date) < 10 THEN '0' ELSE '' END, CAST(MONTH(borrow_date) AS VARCHAR) ) as month_name, COUNT(*) as count FROM borrow_record WHERE deleted = 0 AND borrow_date >= #{startDate} GROUP BY YEAR(borrow_date), MONTH(borrow_date) ORDER BY month_name

SELECT b.title as book_title, COUNT(*) as borrow_count FROM borrow_record br LEFT JOIN book_info b ON br.book_id = b.id WHERE br.deleted = 0 GROUP BY br.book_id, b.title ORDER BY borrow_count DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_record WHERE deleted = 0
